name: CodeGraph

maintainer_notes: First-pass AgentDive collection plus isolated cache validation. The repository was cloned to .cache/sources/colbymchenry__codegraph at the analyzed commit. npm ci, build, CLI version/help, init -i, status, query, callers, impact, MCP initialize/tools-list, and one focused vitest file passed. Full test suite and MCP tools/call behavior are still pending. This remains the default gold-sample candidate, but is not study-ready yet.
